title: Build Services section for handmade guitars, repair, parts, and violin making
acceptance_criteria: Services section displays four cards: Handmade Guitars, Guitar Repair, Guitar Parts, Violin Making.
Each card has an SVG icon (no emojis), title, short description, and hover lift/shadow transition.
Grid is 1 column on mobile, 2 on md, 4 on lg.
Cards use white background on ivory section background for clear hierarchy.
All text meets WCAG AA contrast against card/section backgrounds.
Section anchors can be linked from navigation or hero CTA.
